title: AgroStar Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: AgroStar Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AgroStar Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
